description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck with a streamlined body, elongated neck, and a slightly pointed beak. The plumage is predominantly brown and gray with subtle streaks and patches, giving it a natural, camouflaged appearance. The wings are tucked closely to the body, and the tail feathers are short and slightly fanned. The head features a lighter stripe above the eye, and the beak is a muted orange-brown. The overall form is slender and low to the ground, suggesting a wild duck species. The surface texture appears matte with a slight roughness, mimicking the look of real feathers.
description: A slender, brown-gray duck with a pointed beak, tucked wings, and natural feather patterning. The surface is matte and slightly rough, resembling real feathers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the duck's elongated body, pointed beak, and detailed feather pattern along the flank.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the short, fanned tail feathers and the symmetry of the back plumage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined body and feather details, with the beak pointing left.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the duck's head, beak, and the narrow profile of the body.
